label: 深空密度场
description: 生成深层空间场景的密度权重图，用分形叠加噪声+幂函数极化产生极度不均匀的空间分布，为后续 POI 放置提供密度引导。
description-en: Generates a density weight map for deep-space scenes using fractal noise with power-curve polarization, creating highly uneven spatial distribution to guide POI placement.
icon: 深色方形网格上叠加多层半透明热力色块，中心区域亮橙色高密度、边缘渐变为深蓝低密度，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: width
inputs.label: 网格宽度
inputs.description-en: Number of columns in the output grid.

inputs.name: height
inputs.label: 网格高度
inputs.description-en: Number of rows in the output grid.

inputs.name: scale
inputs.label: 噪声频率
inputs.description: 基础噪声频率（推荐 4–16）：越小区域块越大，越大噪声越细碎
inputs.description-en: Base noise frequency (recommended 4–16): smaller = larger blobs, larger = finer detail.

inputs.name: octaves
inputs.label: 叠加层数
inputs.description: 分形叠加的噪声层数（推荐 3–5），越多细节越丰富
inputs.description-en: Number of fractal octaves (recommended 3–5); more = richer detail.

inputs.name: persistence
inputs.label: 高频衰减
inputs.description: 每叠加层振幅衰减系数（0.1–1.0），越小高频细节越弱
inputs.description-en: Amplitude decay per octave (0.1–1.0); smaller = weaker high-frequency detail.

inputs.name: polarize
inputs.label: 极化指数
inputs.description: 幂函数极化强度（推荐 4–10）：越大则高密度区更密、低密度区更空旷，两极分化越剧烈
inputs.description-en: Power-curve polarization exponent (recommended 4–10): higher = denser peaks and emptier valleys.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间自动随机

outputs.name: densityGrid
outputs.label: 密度权重图
outputs.description: 密度权重网格，值域 0–100，高值区域 POI 放置概率高
outputs.description-en: Density weight grid with values 0–100; higher values mean higher POI placement probability.

outputs.name: groundGrid
outputs.label: 地面底图
outputs.description: 全1地面网格，代表可放置 POI 的平坦地面
outputs.description-en: All-1 ground grid representing flat terrain available for POI placement.
